usage: read_sdf [-help] <sdf_filename> [-continue_on_error] [-ilm_filter] [-increment] [-overwrite_incremental_delay] [-path <instanceName>] [-persistent] [-print_summary] [-scale <float>] [-strict_cond_matching] [-view <viewName>] [-sdf_field {min typ max} | [-early_sdf_field {min typ max}] [-late_sdf_field {min typ max}]]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <sdf_filename> # Specifies the name of the SDF file

options.name: -continue_on_error
options.description: Continues to read the file if an error occurs

options.name: -early_sdf_field
options.description: Annotates the early delay from the specified SDF field

options.name: -increment
options.description: Increments the total delay without affecting the detla delay

options.name: -late_sdf_field
options.description: Annotates the late delay from the specified SDF field

options.name: -overwrite_incremental_delay
options.description: Replaces any pre-existing delta delays with the new SDF values

options.name: -path
options.description: Specifies the instance in the design to which the specified SDF file should be applied

options.name: -persistent
options.description: Keeps the delays from certain SDF files persistently in use during various steps of the timing optimization flow

options.name: -print_summary
options.description: Outputs the summary information of annotated delays

options.name: -scale
options.description: Overrides the automatic scaling of SDF delays to the library units by the value given

options.name: -sdf_field
options.description: Annotates the delay from the specified SDF field

options.name: -strict_cond_matching
options.description: Annotates only the conditions that are an exact syntax-to-syntax match between the SDF file and the .lib file

options.name: -view
options.description: Annotates the specified analysis view with the delays from the SDF file
